microsoft_ft: Owned Azure resilience engagements **end-to-end** for enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), running technical discovery to go-live and platformizing a 2-person effort into a system sustaining **45+ annual drills** and **$14M+ impact**.

Led 0→1 build of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling that **reduced operational toil 30%** and turned ad-hoc validation into a **scalable, reusable** delivery model.

Built and shipped Azure's first **proactive** rack-level drill capability in 4 months at a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable model for continuous validation across customer segments.

Drove a structured product-field feedback loop across 14 cross-org recovery executions under exec visibility, including bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ contract**.
Designed an internal **AI agent** and restructured planning workflows to scale team leverage, cutting planning cycle time **39%** and increasing drill capacity **21%** without added headcount.
microsoft_2023: Built demos and ran training sessions to drive **adoption** of AI-driven code-generation workflows across **14 teams**, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and bridging the gap between model capability and customer-perceived value.

Influenced the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by leading **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams to map current-state pain and quantify the highest-impact feature gaps.
Migrated documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time **83%** and improving retrieval reliability for downstream teams.
microsoft_2022: Drove **$3M** in accelerated revenue and **28% faster** region launches by aligning a unified automation prioritization framework across **140+ teams**.
Ran discovery with **20+ service teams** to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region, then built a roadmap to automate the critical path and reduce launch toil.
Engineered a **Power BI** dashboard tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact support.
amazon_robotics: Delivered **zero downtime** across a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across **1,200+ stations**.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies and prioritized the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process.
Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering to ship automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the deployment cycle **25%**.
pro_painters: Lifted job bookings **26%** by owning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for **200+ monthly proposals** through a new CRM process.
Cut Customer Acquisition Cost **13%** and raised conversions 2.7% via a digital-first go-to-market strategy across web and Google profile.
Analyzed **1,000+ project records** to sealed margin leaks and improve leadership pricing models.
